meaning: 动态静止,动态平衡;n.(社会群体的)自我平衡,原状稳定
examples: After the stressor disappears, the body returns to its normal state (homeostasis).
Next, Fu and her colleagues hope to find other genes related to sleep homeostasis.
Sports training process is to break the high level of low-level homeostasis homeostasis reconstruction process.
We are not above Nature and its fundamental laws. (ie. gravity, homeostasis, mutual reciprocity, etc.).
This scenario offers a sort of homeostasis, in which nothing considerably worsens or improves.
